memoryArtifacts.headline: Hope Covey Will
memoryArtifacts.description:
Hope Covey b. about 1660? , son of James b. 1615 and Mary Covey, married a Mary Unknown, had three children, James b. 1687, Mary and Rachel.
His family belonged to the First Sabbatarian Church, Sevent …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hope Covey於大約1660年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可時，他的父親James Covey46歲，母親Mary Mumford23歲。他於1681年5月2日與Mary Unknown在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德肯特考文垂華盛頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1704年11月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利享年45歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hope Covey于大约1660年出生在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可时，他的父亲James Covey46岁，母亲Mary Mumford23岁。他于1681年5月2日与Mary Unknown在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德肯特考文垂華盛頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1704年11月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利享年45岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利。

nameMeanings.name: Covey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened form of MacCovey, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cobhthaigh (see Coffey ).

English: unexplained. Covey is used of ‘pantry’ in the early modern period and covey ‘little chap’ (a diminutive of cove, Middle English cof ‘bold, eager, courageous’; see Cove ) in the early nineteenth century, but there is no evidence to confirm either as the source for the surname.

variants.name: Coffey
meanings: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cathbhadha ‘descendant of Cathbhadh’, a byname meaning ‘battle tent’, Ó Cathbhuadhaigh ‘descendant of Cathbhuadhach’ (‘battle victorious’), or Ó Cathmhogha ‘descendant of Cathmhugh’ (‘battle slave’).
shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cobhthaigh ‘descendant of Cobhthach’, a byname meaning ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Hope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (Old English hopa) denoting the quality, in particular the Christian quality of expectation in the resurrection and in eternal life. The name was created by the Puritans and has been one of their most successful coinages.

en.lifeSummary: When Hope Covey was born about 1660, in Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States, his father, James Covey, was 46 and his mother, Mary Mumford, was 23. He married Mary Unknown on 2 May 1681, in Washington, Coventry, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 November 1704, in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 45, and was buried in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hope Covey est né environ 1660, à Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, James Covey, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mary Mumford, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mary Unknown le 2 mai 1681, à Washington, Coventry, Kent, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1704, à Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hope Covey um 1660 in Norfolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Covey 46 und seine Mutter Mary Mumford 23. Er hat am 2. Mai 1681 in Washington, Coventry, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America Mary Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1704 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hope Covey è nato il circa 1660 nel Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, James Covey, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Mary Mumford, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mary Unknown il 2 maggio 1681, nel Washington, Coventry, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1704, nel Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hope Coveyが約1660年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクで生まれた時，父James Coveyは46歳，母Mary Mumfordは23歳であった。1681年5月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドケントコベントリーワシュイントンでMary Unknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1704年11月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドキングズウエステルリーで45歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドキングズウエステルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Wollystone, Norfork, Massachusetts, Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리
ko.Washington, Rhode Island, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 켄트 커븐트리 와신그턴
ko.lifeSummary: Hope Covey(이)가 대략 1660년 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Covey(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Mumford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1681년 5월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 켄트 커븐트리 와신그턴에서 Mary Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1704년 11월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hope Covey nasceu aproximadamente 1660, em Norfolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, James Covey, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Mary Mumford, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Unknown em 2 de maio de 1681, em Washington, Coventry, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1704, em Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hope Covey родился около 1660 г. в местности норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени James Covey было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Mumford, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Unknown 2 мая 1681 г. в местности вашингтон, ковентри, кэнт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 ноября 1704 г. в местности вестирли, кингс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности вестирли, кингс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hope Covey nació aproximadamente 1660, en Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, James Covey, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Mary Mumford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Mary Unknown el 2 de mayo de 1681, en Washington, Coventry, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1704, en Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
